research.title: Microsoft Windows Installer Folder Delete Privilege Escalation
research.summary: By Endri Domi Overview This blog post details a logic vulnerability discovered internally in the COM interface exposed from the msi.dll binary. The vulnerability allows a low-privileged user to cause the MSI service to delete an arbitrary folder that the.

research.title: Is Your AppSec Program Built to Close the OWASP Top 10 2025 Coverage Gap?
research.summary: Key Takeaways Most AppSec programs treat API-layer coverage as a DAST extension, but BOLA, BFLA, and SSRF require authenticated multi-role testing that traditional scanners weren’t built to run at scale. Modern authentication flows (OAuth2, JWT validation,.

research.title: How NodeZero® Rapid Response Helps Operationalize BOD 26-04
research.summary: Federal vulnerability management is entering a new phase. CISA’s Binding Operational Directive (BOD) 26-04 represents an important evolution in how federal agencies approach vulnerability remediation. Rather than relying primarily on severity scores, the.

research.title: More than just data: The hidden security risks in Jupyter notebooks
research.summary: Jupyter notebooks are a powerful tool for data scientists, researchers and developers, and their use has been boosted by the increasing popularity of AI and data science. They provide a flexible and interactive environment for combining live code, narrative.

vulns.title: Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor Improper Access Control Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor contains an improper access control vulnerability which could allow for upload and execution of PHP code via the creation of new editor profiles for unauthenticated users.

vulns.title: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (CVE-2026-31694): a malicious FUSE server overflows a.
vulns.summary: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (): a malicious FUSE server overflows a page-cache page by 24 bytes. PoC plus an unprivileged local-root exploit via /etc/passwd page-cache corruption. Run only inside a VM.
vulns.technicalSummary: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (): a malicious FUSE server overflows a page-cache page by 24 bytes. PoC plus an unprivileged local-root exploit via /etc/passwd page-cache corruption. Run only inside a VM.
